name: net_hal
description: Ethernet HAL shim for the Automatic Antenna Tuner firmware. Compile-time-selects between Shawn Silverman's QNEthernet (lwIP) and vjmuzik's NativeEthernet (FNET), exposing a single net_hal::* API + backend-neutral EthernetServer / EthernetClient / EthernetUDP type aliases. The consuming sketch picks the backend by defining exactly one of TUNER_NET_QNETHERNET or TUNER_NET_NATIVEETHERNET via platformio.ini build_flags and adding the matching library to its lib_deps.
